source: Pulled from the space-pirate-zero/MOS repo (README, integrations/meijer-digitalapis, docs).
positioning: Enterprise Consulting — enterprise-grade AI, governed and shipped. Greg Chambers (a.k.a. SPZ) architects AI into corporate and retail infrastructure: strategy first, then working, compliant systems. The bridge between corporate infrastructure and consumer magic.

engagements.name: MOS — Marketing OS (Meijer)
engagements.label: MEIJER · RETAIL
engagements.tagline: Marketing intent in, governed execution out.
engagements.note: MOS and Meijer are the same engagement — MOS is the governed marketing platform built for Meijer.
engagements.summary: Meijer's marketing automation, rebuilt as a governed platform: a declarative language (MOSL) whose documents ARE the deployments, one durable Temporal runtime that executes them all, and MCP tool rails across Meijer's Digital APIs (215 operations over 10 Azure APIM APIs), mPerks loyalty, and Emarsys. Author a journey, campaign, A/B experiment, or cohort as a single .mosl.yaml (43 marketing verbs); compile at PR time; dispatch by event; execute durably against the live opt-out registry — consent and frequency caps enforced structurally, in code and pinned by tests.

prior: Global Group Director of Digital Innovation at Coca-Cola — conversational AI in vending infrastructure ('Operation VR 12Pack').
